0x00001000: 0x10000293    # addi x5, zero, 0x100
0x00001004: 0x12300313    # addi x6, zero, 0x123
0x00001008: 0x0062A023    # sw   x6, 0(x5)
0x0000100C: 0x0062A223    # sw   x6, 4(x5)
0x00001010: 0x00629423    # sh   x6, 8(x5)
0x00001014: 0x00628623    # sb   x6, 12(x5)
0x00001018: 0x0002A383    # lw   x7, 0(x5)
0x0000101C: 0x0042A403    # lw   x8, 4(x5)
0x00001020: 0x00829483    # lh   x9, 8(x5)
0x00001024: 0x0082D503    # lhu  x10, 8(x5)
0x00001028: 0x00C28583    # lb   x11, 12(x5)
0x0000102C: 0x00C2C603    # lbu  x12, 12(x5)
0x00001030: 0xFF010113    # addi sp, sp, -16
0x00001034: 0x00112623    # sw   ra, 12(sp)
0x00001038: 0x00812423    # sw   s0, 8(sp)
0x0000103C: 0x00A12023    # sw   a0, 0(sp)
0x00001040: 0x00012503    # lw   a0, 0(sp)
0x00001044: 0x00812403    # lw   s0, 8(sp)
0x00001048: 0x00C12083    # lw   ra, 12(sp)
0x0000104C: 0x01010113    # addi sp, sp, 16
